result.vlm_summary:
page_state:
ArXiv search results page showing “1–50 of 61 results” for the query about deep learning models for cybersecurity applications, sorted by newest announcement date. Page 1 is active; page 2 and Next are visible.
task_relevant_visible_text:
“Showing 1–50 of 61 results”
“Query: order: announced_date_first; size: 50; classification: Computer Science (cs); include_cross_list: True; terms: AND all=deep learning models for cybersecurity applications”
1. “arXiv:2602.08690 … cs.LG … SoK: The Pitfalls of Deep Reinforcement Learning for Cybersecurity”
2. “arXiv:2601.15177 … cs.CR … Dynamic Management of a Deep Learning-Based Anomaly Detection System for 5G Networks”
3. “arXiv:2512.03200 … Deteccion de intrusiones en redes mediante algoritmos de aprendizaje”
selected_candidate:
Top visible result: arXiv:2602.08690, “SoK: The Pitfalls of Deep Reinforcement Learning for Cybersecurity” (cs.LG / cs.CR)
constraint_evidence:
- Most recent paper: supported by sort “Announcement date (newest first)” and result 1 being topmost visible.
- Topic related to deep learning models for cybersecurity applications: supported partially by query text and visible titles mentioning deep learning/cybersecurity.
- Computer Science category: supported by query text “classification: Computer Science (cs)” and visible cs.* tags.
- Need locate paper on ArXiv: supported by URL/title and results list.
- Exact paper matching query: not_visible.
- Must choose most recent among matching results: supported by
